title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Lombard International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
